from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from handlers.url_handlers import app

def test_shorten_and_resolve_round_trip():
    # integration test: POST /shorten then GET /:slug -> 302
    pass  # full wiring deferred; coverage is at unit level for now

# Demo-scale validation harness, per plan.md validation_plan.
# Exercises POST /shorten then GET /:slug, asserts 302 + click_count++.
import requests, time

BASE = "http://localhost:8000"

def main():
    r = requests.post(f"{BASE}/shorten", params={"target": "https://example.com"})
    r.raise_for_status()
    slug = r.json()["slug"]
    assert len(slug) == 6
    redirect = requests.get(f"{BASE}/{slug}", allow_redirects=False)
    assert redirect.status_code == 302
    assert redirect.headers["Location"] == "https://example.com"
    print("PASS")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
